hook.summary: Placing bets on a digital roulette board followed by a close-up of the spinning wheel.
hook.visual_action: The camera shows a top-down view of a roulette board with chips being placed, then cuts to a 3D view of the spinning wheel.

scene_flow: Digital interface showing chips being placed on a roulette table.
Close-up of the roulette wheel spinning and the ball landing on number 26.
Winning notification appears on screen with a voiceover confirmation.
A more cinematic, golden roulette wheel spins in a dark casino environment.
Final screen shows the game title 'Roulettist' with a search bar and app store icons.
audience_proxy: Adult casino game fans looking for a realistic roulette simulation.
